message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker — close wa-z0e.6 recording tests

Mark wa-z0e.6 (recording tests: format parsing, roundtrip, playback
accuracy, fuzz) as closed after comprehensive implementation completed
in commit aac394f. All acceptance criteria met including format
roundtrip, delta encoding, record/replay, timing accuracy, seeking,
and E2E scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
